article_title: B.C. Reg. 249/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission

briefs.title: BC Securities Rules Now Require Clearer Investment Fund Cost Reporting to Clients
briefs.summary: Effective January 1, 2026, BC updated its securities registration rules to require investment dealers and advisers to report fund costs to clients in dollars per day — not just as percentages — making fees easier to understand.
briefs.action_required: Review your client reporting processes to ensure fund expense costs are calculated and disclosed in dollars per security by January 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC NI 31-103 amended fund cost disclosure rules take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 249/2025 – British Columbia Securities Commission
